rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Amended Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Administrator
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend, to be filed within 15 days, as to statute of limitations because the Petition does not allege sufficient facts to support a claim for equitable estoppel, and, on the face of the Petition, the one-year statute of limitations on creditor's claims under CCP Sections 366.2 and 366.3 ran before Petitioner brought a creditor's claim or filed a petition on the claim. The demurrer on the basis of uncertainty is overruled, because the Petition alleges facts and claims to which the Administrator can reasonably respond. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, June 27, 2018.
